insights.rationale: Operators consistently noted that the test skill lacks concrete SCAMPER worked examples, making the methodology hard to apply. Two independent feedback records cite the same gap.
insights.proposed_addition:

insights.rationale: One operator reported confusion about when to invoke this skill versus a sibling; adding an explicit decision tree would help.
insights.proposed_addition:
## Decision Tree

- If X then use test_skill
- If Y then use sibling
